zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby於從大約1100年到1114年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆時，她的父親William 'the Junior' de Peverell II34歲，母親Avice de Lancaster26歲。她於1135年與Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby在英國斯塔福爾圖特波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1154年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby于从大约1100年到1114年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆时，她的父亲William 'the Junior' de Peverell II34岁，母亲Avice de Lancaster26岁。她于1135年与Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby在英国斯塔福爾圖特波利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1154年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby was born from about 1100 to 1114, in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, William 'the Junior' de Peverell II, was 34 and her mother, Avice de Lancaster, was 26. She married Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby in 1135, in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1154, in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby est née du environ 1100 au 1114, à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William 'the Junior' de Peverell II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Avice de Lancaster, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby en 1135, à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1154, à Merevale, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Merevale, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby von um 1100 bis 1114 in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William 'the Junior' de Peverell II 34 und ihre Mutter Avice de Lancaster 26. Sie hat 1135 in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1154 in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby è nata il da circa 1100 a 1114 nel Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, William 'the Junior' de Peverell II, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Avice de Lancaster, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby nel 1135, nel Tutbury, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1154, nel Merevale, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Merevale, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Peverell Countess of Derbyがから約1100年まで1114年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムで生まれた時，父William 'the Junior' de Peverell IIは34歳，母Avice de Lancasterは26歳であった。1135年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーでRobert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1154年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアメレベルで死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアメレベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby(이)가 대략 1100년 부터 1114년 까지 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William 'the Junior' de Peverell II(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice de Lancaster(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1135년 영국 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에서 Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1154년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 머에발에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 머에발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby nasceu de aproximadamente 1100 a 1114, em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William 'the Junior' de Peverell II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Avice de Lancaster, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby em 1135, em Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1154, em Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby родилась с около 1100 по 1114 в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William 'the Junior' de Peverell II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Avice de Lancaster, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby в 1135 г. в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1154 г. в местности миревеил, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности миревеил, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby nació desde aproximadamente 1100 hasta 1114, en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William 'the Junior' de Peverell II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Avice de Lancaster, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby en 1135, en Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1154, en Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
